title: assertion failure constant evaluating function with OOB accesses

features.name: function return value OOB single bit access
features.description: Code should include a function with a small return type where an out-of-bounds single bit is accessed and assigned

features.name: function return value OOB bit slice access
features.description: Code should include a function with a small return type where an out-of-bounds bit slice is accessed and assigned

features.name: constant evaluation of function with OOB accesses
features.description: Code should include a localparam or constant context that evaluates a function call which performs out-of-bounds accesses
